scripts.release:build: corepack pnpm --filter @senlinz/import-export-wasm build && corepack pnpm --filter @senlinz/import-export build
scripts.release:pack: rm -rf /tmp/import-export-release && mkdir -p /tmp/import-export-release && corepack pnpm --dir packages/wasm pack --pack-destination /tmp/import-export-release && corepack pnpm --dir packages/core pack --pack-destination /tmp/import-export-release
scripts.release:check: corepack pnpm run release:build && corepack pnpm run release:pack
